common.tagline: Connecting Korean sellers with trusted American buyers.
common.saveError: Could not update this saved item.

businessParagraphs: Each seller and buyer is responsible for product information, pricing, lead times, export/import requirements, submitted documents, payment terms, shipping terms, and transaction outcomes. Users should conduct their own due diligence, contract review, legal review, and payment-safety checks before entering into any transaction.

Unless separately stated, Trade82 does not provide payment protection, escrow services, import approval, product compliance review, customs clearance support, or any promise that a transaction will be completed.

legalLinks.label: Sourcing and Transaction Support Service Terms

home.headline: Move Korean products from listing to U.S. buyer inquiry faster.
home.subheadline: Trade82 helps Korean suppliers structure product data, control sensitive fields, and turn U.S. buyer discovery into qualified sourcing conversations.
home.valueText1: Review business type, export countries, response speed, and available trade documents before starting a conversation.
home.valueText2: Compare price, MOQ, lead time, HS code, logistics terms, packaging, documents, and U.S.-market fit in one view.
home.valueText3: Send structured inquiries and keep sourcing conversations organized.
home.catalogDescription: Browse listed products with pricing, MOQ, lead time, submitted documents, shipping terms, and seller context.
home.sellerDescription: Review supplier capabilities, export history, response speed, and trade terms before reaching out.
home.howTitle: Move from discovery to inquiry with less friction
home.howDescription: Trade82 keeps the data Korean sellers and American buyers need close to the conversation.
home.step1Text: Browse products, Korean sellers, and American buyer profiles with focused search and filters.
home.step2: Compare price, MOQ, lead time, documents, and shipping terms
home.step2Text: Use structured trade information to qualify products before sending a message.
home.step3Text: Send a complete inquiry and manage the conversation in your inbox.
home.ctaTitle: Start building your U.S. buyer pipeline with Trade82.
home.ctaText: Create a supplier profile, register products, and give U.S. buyers the structured information they need to start a conversation.
home.featureGridTitle: A cleaner B2B workflow from product data to buyer inquiry
home.featureGridText: Trade82 turns scattered supplier information into a structured marketplace experience built for U.S. sourcing teams.
home.featureListingsText: Product photos, categories, MOQ, lead time, documents, packaging, and U.S. channel notes stay organized in one listing.
home.featureVisibilityText: Choose what is public, private, or inquiry-only so sensitive pricing and logistics details stay under control.
home.featureDiscoveryText: U.S. buyers can search Korean products by category, keyword, and market fit before starting a conversation.
home.featureInquiryText: Buyer questions turn into structured Trade82 messages instead of scattered cold emails.
home.featureDashboardText: Manage listings, product status, saved interest, and buyer conversations from a compact SaaS console.
home.featureTradeDataText: Keep product, compliance, shipping, and packaging information close to the buyer conversation.
home.roleSupplierText: Register your company, list products, and receive qualified U.S. buyer inquiries.
home.roleBuyerText: Tell Trade82 what products you are sourcing and discover Korean suppliers faster.
home.flowStepText: Each step keeps the next trade conversation easier to evaluate.
home.visualProductTitle: PDRN ampoule set with MOQ, lead time, and documents
home.visualInquiryTitle: Buyer asks for samples and carton specs
home.visualInquiryText: A buyer asks for sample availability, carton dimensions, monthly capacity, and private-label options.

marketplace.label: Marketplace
marketplace.title: Browse Korean products ready for U.S. import review
marketplace.description: Search and filter by category, price range, MOQ, certifications, and shipping terms. Every card links to a detailed trade profile.
marketplace.emptyText: Try a broader category, certification, or shipping term.
marketplace.noProductsListedText: Products are being added. Browse listed Korean sellers or join Trade82 as a supplier.

product.importReminderText: This platform centralizes trade information, but U.S. buyers should independently verify import regulations, FDA/FTC requirements, labeling rules, product claims, and payment terms.

sellers.label: Sellers
sellers.title: Korean seller companies
sellers.description: Find listed manufacturers, distributors, wholesalers, and brand owners with export capabilities and trade documentation.
sellers.emptyText: Try another category, state, or export filter.
sellers.noCompaniesListedText: Seller profiles are being added. Browse the marketplace or join Trade82 as a supplier.

company.tradeNoteText: Trade82 reviews submitted company profile information for marketplace quality, but does not guarantee product claims, payment performance, compliance, or transaction outcomes. Buyers and sellers should perform their own due diligence.

buyers.label: American buyers
buyers.title: Buyer demand from the American market
buyers.description: Korean sellers can discover U.S. importers, distributors, retailers, and online sellers with clear buying requirements.
buyers.emptyText: Try another buyer type, category, or experience filter.
buyers.noBuyerProfilesListedText: Real American buyer company profiles will appear here after they are listed.

buyer.sellerGuidanceText: This profile helps Korean sellers understand order size, sales channels, import experience, and timing before sending an outreach message.

dashboard.label: Dashboard
dashboard.title: Sourcing workspace
dashboard.description: Track saved products, recent messages, and marketplace activity.
dashboard.pendingAdminReviewText: Your company submission is private while an administrator checks the business details and supporting document.
dashboard.noSavedProducts: No saved products yet. Save products from marketplace cards or product detail pages.
dashboard.noInquiries: No inquiries yet. Contact sellers or buyers to populate this inbox.
dashboard.publicListingHidden: Your company and products are hidden from public pages.
dashboard.productManagementHelp: Manage every product you uploaded. Preparing products stay hidden from public marketplace pages.
dashboard.productsLoadFailed: Unable to load products. Please try again.
dashboard.productUpdateFailed: Unable to update product. Please try again.
dashboard.productDeleteFailed: Unable to delete product. Please try again.
dashboard.productSetPreparing: Product moved to preparing and hidden from public marketplace pages.
dashboard.deleteProductConfirm: Delete this product? This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.supportTeamDescription: Get help preparing U.S. buyer-facing product copy, inquiry replies, MOQ/sample terms, and outreach materials.
dashboard.supportTeamActiveDescription: Your Seller Support plan is active. Open your Trade82 Support Team conversation when you need help.
dashboard.buyerCompanyIntro: {company} can track product interests, saved products, and seller conversations from one workspace.
dashboard.buyerCompanyIntroEmpty: Tell Trade82 what products you are looking for, then start discovering Korean products.
dashboard.productDiscoveryHelp: Recommended Korean products based on your selected product types and keywords.
dashboard.startExploringKoreanProducts: Start by exploring Korean products and saving items that match your sourcing needs.
dashboard.startByExploringProducts: Start by exploring Korean products, then send an inquiry to a seller.

admin.label: Admin Console
admin.consoleDescription: Manage company listings, review queues, and marketplace content.
admin.companyQueueDescription: Review pending company submissions. Publish or reject new seller and buyer company pages.
admin.allCompaniesDescription: View every seller and buyer company. See listing status, owner, and inquiry counts. Take action on any company.
admin.sellerCompaniesDescription: Filter all companies to Korean seller profiles only.
admin.buyerCompaniesDescription: Filter all companies to American buyer profiles only.
admin.dealReviewsDescription: Show or hide completed-deal reviews submitted by listed companies.
admin.companyReviewsDescription: Moderate anonymous company reviews submitted by marketplace members.
admin.inquiryHistoryDescription: Browse all buyer-seller inquiries across the marketplace.
admin.privateDocumentsDescription: Open signed-URL access to company documents submitted during onboarding.
admin.reportedReviewsDescription: View and remove reviews that have been flagged as inappropriate.
admin.companiesPageDescription: View and manage all seller and buyer companies. Use the action buttons to publish, pause, or reject a company listing.
admin.searchCompaniesPlaceholder: Search companies by name, owner email, location, status, or role
admin.noCompaniesTitle: No companies in the database yet.
admin.noCompaniesText: Sign up a new account and complete seller or buyer onboarding to create the first company.
admin.confirmRejectListing: Reject this listing? It will be hidden from the default admin review list.
admin.confirmDeleteProduct: Delete this product? This action cannot be undone.
admin.confirmDeleteProductPermanent: Delete this product permanently? This removes the product record and related images. This action cannot be undone.
admin.confirmDeleteCompanyPermanent: Delete this company permanently? This removes its admin/public listing, products, reviews, inquiries, and related files where possible. This action cannot be undone.
admin.reviewPageDescription: Review pending Korean seller and American buyer company submissions. Private documents are used only for internal review.
admin.unableLoadQueue: Unable to load the admin queue.
admin.noCompanyRequests: No company profiles are waiting for review.
admin.testSubmissionHelp: To create a test submission locally: sign up a new account, complete seller or buyer onboarding, and upload a business document. The submission will appear here.
admin.companyRequestsHelp: Default view shows only company submissions still waiting for admin review.
admin.noListedCompanyRequests: No listed company registration requests in this queue.

messages.label: Messages
messages.title: Local inquiry inbox
messages.description: Review your inquiry threads and replies stored securely in the marketplace database.
messages.emptyText: Contact a seller from the marketplace to create an inquiry thread.
messages.profileNotListed: This profile is not publicly listed.
messages.dropFiles: Drop PDF or image files here
messages.attachmentHelp: Large PDF and image files are supported for business documents and product photos.
messages.uploadFailed: Upload failed because the storage service rejected the file. Please try again.
messages.sendBlockedWhileUploading: Please wait for attachments to finish uploading.
messages.messageSendFailed: Unable to send this message. Please try again.

deals.otherRequestedCompletion: The other company requested deal completion.
deals.completeReviewPrompt: This deal is complete. You can now write a deal-based review.

auth.loginText: Use Google Sign-In through Clerk to access the marketplace.
auth.signupText: Create an account with Clerk, then complete your buyer or seller profile.

onboarding.roleDescription: Select how you want to use Trade82.
onboarding.roleBuyerDescription: I want to source Korean products and contact Korean sellers.
onboarding.roleSellerDescription: I want to list Korean products and connect with American buyers.
onboarding.pathPickerTitle: Start with the way you trade
onboarding.pathPickerText: Trade82 keeps product discovery, controlled visibility, and buyer inquiries in one focused B2B workflow.
onboarding.roleListProductsDescription: Create product pages, control sensitive pricing and logistics fields, and receive qualified buyer inquiries.
onboarding.roleFindProductsDescription: Browse Korean products by category, market fit, and keywords before starting a sourcing conversation.
onboarding.processText: Korean sellers upload product information, Trade82 organizes it for U.S. buyers, and inquiries become structured export conversations.
onboarding.flowUploadProductText: Add Korean product photos, categories, descriptions, and buyer-facing notes.
onboarding.flowAddTermsText: Decide what is public, private, or inquiry-only before buyers see the listing.
onboarding.flowMatchBuyersText: Products become easier to discover by category, market, and keywords.
onboarding.flowReceiveInquiryText: Interested buyers send structured questions instead of scattered cold emails.
onboarding.flowExportConversationText: Sellers receive a qualified lead and can respond with the right context.
onboarding.demoInquiryText: Can you share carton specs, lead time, and sample options for U.S. retail?
onboarding.sellerCompanyStepText: Add the company details American buyers need before they contact you.
onboarding.buyerCompanyStepText: Add buyer company details so Korean sellers understand your sourcing needs.
onboarding.buyerQuickTitle: Tell Trade82 what products you want to source
onboarding.buyerQuickDescription: This short business profile is separate from Clerk account creation. It helps Trade82 recommend Korean products and organize seller inquiries.
onboarding.accountContactHelp: Use the work email and contact name attached to your buyer account.
onboarding.companyInformationHelp: Keep this short. You can add more company details later from the dashboard.
onboarding.productInterestsHelp: Choose product types and keywords so the buyer dashboard can prioritize relevant Korean products.
onboarding.agreementHelp: Review the legal terms before saving your buyer profile.
onboarding.productTypesRequired: Select at least one type of product.
onboarding.productTypesHelp: You can update these categories later as your sourcing priorities change.
onboarding.keywordsHelp: Add keywords like skincare, collagen, snacks, supplements, or beauty device.
onboarding.keywordsRequired: Add at least one interested keyword.
onboarding.termsRequired: Agree to the terms of service and privacy policy.
onboarding.authSeparateNotice: Password and login are handled by the account sign-up step. This form only saves buyer business information.
onboarding.buyerSignupFixErrors: Check the highlighted buyer profile fields.
onboarding.personalStepText: Add the contact details buyers and sellers will see when conversations begin.
onboarding.productStepText: Add one product with images so American buyers can understand your first listing.
onboarding.sourcingStepText: Select the categories, order range, and channels you are looking for.
onboarding.locationRequired: Select a location and enter the required city details.
onboarding.sourcingCategoriesRequired: Select at least one Korean product category.
onboarding.privateDocumentUploadError: Unable to upload the company document.
onboarding.previewText: A clean trade workspace for Korean sellers and American buyers.
onboarding.roleError: We could not save your account type. Please try again.
onboarding.completeError: We could not complete onboarding. Please try again.
onboarding.manualReviewNotice: Your company details and submitted document will be checked manually. Documents are never shown publicly.
onboarding.buyerReviewNotice: Your American buyer company details will be checked manually before the company page is listed.
onboarding.documentPlaceholder: Upload placeholder only. Secure document storage must be configured before production launch.
onboarding.privateDocumentNotice: This submitted document is stored privately and can only be opened by an administrator while checking company information.
onboarding.buyerTitle: Create an American buyer sourcing profile
onboarding.buyerDescription: Create an American buyer profile with interested categories, sales channels, import experience, and purchasing requirements.
onboarding.sellerTitle: Create a Korean seller export profile
onboarding.sellerDescription: Create a Korean seller profile with categories, business details, MOQ, lead time, terms, and documents.
onboarding.profileSavedText: Your onboarding profile has been saved.

settings.companySaveError: Unable to save company profile. Please try again.
settings.profileLoadError: Unable to load professional information. Refresh the page and try again.
settings.productSaveError: Unable to save product. Please try again.
settings.unsavedChangesWarning: You have unsaved changes. Leave this page?
settings.draftAvailable: A temporary draft is available from your last editing session.
settings.invalidUrl: Enter a valid URL including https://.
settings.profilePanelText: Manage your login name, email, and Clerk account avatar for account UI only.
settings.securityPanelText: Manage passwords, connected accounts, sessions, and account security through Clerk.
settings.sellerDashboardDescription: Manage your Korean seller company, products, profile review, and inquiries from American buyers.
settings.buyerDashboardDescription: Manage your saved products, seller conversations, and sourcing inquiries.
settings.contactProfileDescription: Manage the Trade82 marketplace contact person and profile photo separately from your Clerk login identity.
settings.companyProfileDescription: Manage your business identity, company logo, role-specific details, and listing-sensitive fields.
settings.buyerProfileDescription: Manage your buyer profile, sourcing preferences, and contact information.
settings.companyProfileMissingText: Add company details before using the full role dashboard.
settings.buyerProfileMissingText: Add buyer identity and sourcing preferences before using the buyer dashboard.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: This permanently removes your Trade82 public presence. Your company pages, product listings, saved items, profile photo, company logos, product images, submitted company documents, and user-owned message attachments will be removed or hidden.
settings.deleteAccountRemovesPublicData: Your public company profiles and product listings will no longer appear in Trade82.
settings.deleteAccountRemovesUploads: Trade82 will delete uploaded company logos, profile photos, product images, submitted company documents, and user-owned message attachments where ownership is known.
settings.deleteAccountKeepsHistory: Existing conversations may remain for the other participant, but your account and company identity will be shown as deleted and private attachments you uploaded will be removed.
settings.deleteAccountError: Unable to delete your account. Please try again.
settings.logoPreviewHint: PDF logos will open as a document preview.
settings.logoStorageNotice: Use the URL field for direct links, or upload a file to store it in Supabase.
settings.logoPdfNotice: PDF, JPG, PNG, and WebP files are accepted for company logos.
settings.logoUploadInProgress: Logo upload is still in progress. You can click Save now; Trade82 will save after the upload finishes.
settings.logoUploadSaveQueued: Logo upload is finishing. Your company profile will save automatically.
settings.verifiedCompanyText: Your company listing is public and may appear in the marketplace.
settings.pendingCompanyText: Your company is private while listing information is pending or incomplete.
settings.rejectedCompanyText: Review the company details and request another listing check.
settings.buyerProfileSectionDescription: Keep buyer identity, sourcing preferences, and contact information aligned with your onboarding profile.
settings.contactPersonManaged: Contact person name and title are managed in Professional Info. Email and phone are not shown publicly.
settings.sellerProductsOnly: Product management is available for Korean seller accounts.
settings.productVisibilityRule: Only active products from listed Korean seller companies appear publicly.
settings.noProducts: No products have been added yet.
settings.minimumUnitPriceHelper: Enter the lowest estimated unit price for buyer reference.

contact.messagePlaceholder: Share quantity, market channel, required documents, target timeline, and questions.
contact.inquirySavedText: Your inquiry was saved. You can review the thread, add replies, and see it on your dashboard.
contact.startChatFailed: Could not open messages. Please try again.
contact.completeProfileBeforeContact: Complete your company profile before contacting companies.
contact.ownCompany: You cannot contact your own company.
contact.limitedNotice: Your company is not listed yet. You can send a limited introductory inquiry. Order quantity and target date become available after the company listing is public.
contact.limitedInquiry: Limited inquiry from a not-listed account
contact.unavailable: This seller, buyer, or product is unavailable. Please return to the listing and try again.

reviews.title: Review title
reviews.loginToReview: Sign in to leave a review
reviews.commentPlaceholder: Share your experience, communication, quality, and trust signals.

productForm.visibilityHelper: Use “Inquiry required” for pricing, MOQ, documents, ingredients, and logistics details you do not want competitors to see publicly.
productForm.imagesPublicNote: Product images are public, so only upload images you are comfortable showing publicly.

productDetail.sellerProvidedNotice: Information and documents are provided by the seller. Buyers should independently review import, FDA/FTC, labeling, product claims, and state-level requirements before purchase.
productDetail.importReminderText: Trade82 organizes seller-provided trade information, but U.S. buyers should independently review import regulations, FDA/FTC requirements, labeling rules, product claims, payment terms, and contract terms.
productDetail.hiddenFieldsHelp: Some product details are shared by the seller after an inquiry.

listing.builderHelp: Build a buyer-ready listing with clear trade terms, controlled field visibility, and crisp product images.
listing.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the product, key features, target buyers, and what makes it suitable for the U.S. market.
listing.imageUploadInProgress: Uploading image... You can save now, then retry or update images if an upload fails.

errors.images: Add at least one product image.
errors.name: Enter a product name.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.text: The marketplace profile you are looking for is not available.
